failing_pipelines.issue: Telegram API rate limit (429 Too Many Requests)
failing_pipelines.fix_description: Telegram rate limit error in Pipeline start step - will auto-resolve when rate limit resets

failing_pipelines.issue: Dependabot workflow run - not a PR
failing_pipelines.fix_description: This is a dependabot security update workflow run, not an actual PR failure

failing_pipelines.issue: Dependabot workflow run - not a PR
failing_pipelines.fix_description: This is a dependabot security update workflow run, not an actual PR failure
The OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable is not set for this repo. Requires running setup.py from dmzoneill/dmzoneill to distribute secrets.

telegram_rate_limit_issue.root_cause: telegram-notify.py script in dispatch.yaml Pipeline start step hitting Telegram API rate limits
telegram_rate_limit_issue.error_message: Error sending message: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests for url: https://api.telegram.org/bot***/sendMessage
telegram_rate_limit_issue.impact: Causes CICD workflow to fail at Pipeline start, skipping all subsequent steps (lint, test, build, publish)
telegram_rate_limit_issue.fix_recommendation: Wait for Telegram rate limit to reset (typically 1 hour). Consider implementing rate limit handling in telegram-notify.py.

fixed_pipelines_cumulative.fix_description: Version tag conflict resolved by bumping version from 1.0.13 to 1.0.17

open_dependabot_prs.title: Bump minimatch from 3.1.2 to 3.1.5
open_dependabot_prs.author: dependabot[bot]
open_dependabot_prs.issue: GNOME publish step fails with missing credentials
open_dependabot_prs.fix_description: The gnome-extension-publisher requires GNOME_USERNAME and GNOME_PASSWORD secrets which are not distributed by setup.py. Error: 'Username and password are required for upload.'
open_dependabot_prs.action_recommendation: Add GNOME_USERNAME and GNOME_PASSWORD to setup.py secret distribution, then rerun workflow

gnome_extension_publisher.issue: GNOME extension publishing requires credentials not in setup.py
gnome_extension_publisher.root_cause: The gnome-extension-publisher tool requires GNOME_USERNAME and GNOME_PASSWORD secrets for uploading to extensions.gnome.org. These secrets are not in the current setup.py distribution list.
gnome_extension_publisher.fix_required: Add GNOME_USERNAME and GNOME_PASSWORD to setup.py secret distribution
gnome_extension_publisher.fix_implementation: Add two new secrets to the SECRETS list and obtain credentials from GNOME Extensions account
gnome_extension_publisher.impact: Blocks GNOME extension publishing across all repos with gnome-extension-publisher enabled

openai_api_key_missing.issue: OPENAI_API_KEY not distributed to ollama-proxy repo
openai_api_key_missing.root_cause: The AI Issue Responder workflow requires OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable. The secret exists in setup.py but hasn't been distributed to this specific repo.
openai_api_key_missing.fix_required: Run setup.py to distribute OPENAI_API_KEY to ollama-proxy
openai_api_key_missing.impact: AI Issue Responder workflow fails for ollama-proxy
